title: centaurea scabiosa var. glehnii
intro: Centaurea scabiosa var. glehnii, also known as the Siberian scabiosa, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the aster family and is native to the Russian Far East and northeastern China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, including bronchitis and asthma. Centaurea scabiosa var. glehnii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
